title: Log Board exports in the Activity Log
excerpt: Add the ability to see when a user exports a board.  This is currently only available in the Enterprise plan.  Just a simple line in the board’s activity log.  If it can be used in automations that is a bonus.

posts.author: JohnPage3 (John Smyth)
posts.cookedHtml: Add the ability to see when a user exports a board. This is currently only available in the Enterprise plan. Just a simple line in the board’s activity log. If it can be used in automations that is a bonus.
